title: Mega Factorio
description: it a fun clan vs clan war as people try to get at to the end well fighting a army of undead and more worlds to have fun in :D
body: Mega Factorio is a nice modpack that inc engineer stuff and space stuff but in it as it is going be in beta wo know what new update and fixing well happen so on your end your a engineer lombax that landing on the world so hard in it own space ship and now stuck on it no way back so you have to find a way to get back and you did lose all of your good tools and armor and tool/weapon that is the omniwrench so you got to find a way to get a new set of stuff and get better and fight to live to next day well try to not make the world into a wasteland becell of your own pollution from your tech as you have to find a way to make it work and not hurt your self well doing power work and more ones you get better and make tech to do all of your hands work so you can make more better stuff you and all over the world like as you did land hard on the world you have to fight as well some of the race wo landed hard and have the same thin happen like you as all avalis and more race keep falling on this biger world so keep your gear up and lock and load to fight back and live to next day and make new friends wo you can try to trust and do the best thin and right thins to help or let they dead have fun [pls do join the discord server we do have idea to have a update news for it an people wo good at what to join as a team to help out and make this modpack biger can help out for long your good and not bad so ye join on this link to r discord server in this box [ (https://discord.gg/CrwnW5TgU8) ]
